sections.title: Highlights
sections.body_markdown:
- Shipped **auth hardening** behind the feature flag `auth_harden_v2`; zero Sev1.
- **On-call** was quiet; one P3 rolled to next week.
- **CI** median pipeline under **8 minutes** after cache tuning.

sections.title: Risks
sections.body_markdown:
- **Dependency** upstream SDK releases a breaking API in **June** — tracking vendor RFC **RFC-901**.
- **Capacity:** two engineers OOO next sprint; scope freeze on net-new features.

sections.title: Metrics snapshot
sections.body_markdown:
| Metric | This week | Notes |
|--------|-----------|------|
| MTTR | 45m | Within SLO |
| Deploy frequency | 3/day | Stable |

sections.title: Merge throughput
sections.body_markdown: Sustained increase after CI cache fix in week 2.

sections.title: Next week focus
sections.body_markdown:
1. Finish flag rollout to **10%** canary.
2. Pair on runbook for dependency migration.
3. Dry-run **June** SDK upgrade in staging.
